meta.note: Updated nightly via cron. Source: MS Learn MCP + MS Release Notes + Tech Community Blog.

features.title: GPT-5.5 Instant in Copilot Chat
features.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant delivers more accurate, concise responses with better performance on image analysis and STEM tasks. Available in Copilot Chat for faster everyday responses.
features.demo_angle: Show model selector in Copilot Chat — switch between GPT-5.5 Instant (speed) and Thinking (depth).

features.title: GPT-5.5 Thinking in Copilot Chat
features.description: GPT-5.5 Thinking enables deeper reasoning and complex problem-solving in Copilot Chat — multi-step planning, structured analysis, comparing strategies.
features.demo_angle: Ask a complex multi-step business question. Show how Thinking model works through it step by step.

features.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 in PowerPoint
features.description: Choose between GPT-Image (OpenAI) and Flux (Microsoft) models when adding AI-generated images to slides. GPT-Image delivers photorealistic results; Flux offers artistic styles.
features.demo_angle: Create a presentation → Add image to title slide → Show model picker (GPT-Image vs Flux). Huge wow moment.

features.title: Implicit Grounding in Outlook (Copilot Chat)
features.description: Select an email or highlight text in Outlook and add it directly to your Copilot Chat prompt. Reduces manual copy-paste and gives Copilot the right context instantly.
features.demo_angle: Open an email thread in Outlook, select it, ask Copilot Chat to summarize + draft reply — all without switching apps.

features.title: Open PDFs inside Copilot Chat
features.description: PDFs now open directly inside Copilot Chat — no separate viewer or browser tab. Ask Copilot to summarize, extract action items, or compare sections without switching context.
features.demo_angle: Click a PDF attachment in Copilot Chat. Ask 'summarize this and list action items'. Show the inline view.

features.title: Copilot in Excel — Plan Mode
features.description: Plan Mode shows you exactly what Copilot intends to do before making any changes to your spreadsheet. Review the plan, adjust if needed, then confirm. Complete transparency before action.
features.demo_angle: Open KPI spreadsheet. Ask Copilot with Plan mode: 'highlight underperforming plants and add summary row'. Show plan review before confirming.

features.title: Web Grounding in PowerPoint — URL as Slide Source
features.description: Paste a public URL as a source when creating slides. Copilot uses live web content to ground slide content — not just training data. Great for market context or competitor slides.
features.demo_angle: In PowerPoint Copilot, add a slide → paste an industry URL → Copilot grounds the content on that page.

features.title: Copilot in Word — Claude (Anthropic) as Model Option
features.description: Choose Anthropic Claude as the AI model for drafting and editing in Word. Better for long-form writing, technical specifications, and documents requiring precise language.
features.demo_angle: In Word Copilot, show the model picker. Select Claude for a technical spec document. Compare output quality.

features.title: Legal Agent in Word (Frontier)
features.description: The Legal Agent in Word helps legal teams review, analyze, and summarize contracts and legal documents. Part of the new agentic Word capabilities.
features.demo_angle: Only available in Frontier. Mention as future preview for customers on M365 Copilot.

features.title: Copilot in OneNote — Understands Images & Tables
features.description: Copilot in OneNote now understands images, tables, and mixed content in notebooks — delivering richer, more accurate insights from all your note types.
features.demo_angle: Open a OneNote page with mixed content (images + tables). Ask Copilot to summarize the notebook section.

features.title: Federated Copilot Connectors
features.description: Real-time enterprise data via partner connectors: Moody's, HubSpot, LSEG (London Stock Exchange), Notion, and more. Data streams directly into Copilot without copying to Microsoft.
features.demo_angle: Show connector catalog in Admin Center. 'Your SAP data, Salesforce, Moody's — Copilot reads it all in real time.'

features.title: Copilot Cowork — Multi-App Agentic Workflows
features.description: Cowork enables autonomous multi-step workflows across multiple M365 apps. Give Copilot a complex goal — it plans and executes across Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel automatically.
features.demo_angle: Frontier only — show announcement. 'This is what Frontier unlocks: true agentic workflows across your entire M365 suite.'

features.title: Agent Builder in Copilot Chat (No license required)
features.description: Build custom agents directly in Copilot Chat without an M365 Copilot license. No PayGo required for web-search-grounded agents. PayGo unlocks file upload as knowledge source.
features.demo_angle: Show Agent Builder UI in Copilot Chat. Build a web-research agent in 5 minutes. No license needed.

features.title: Deep Research Agent in Copilot Chat
features.description: Deep Research conducts autonomous multi-step research: searches the web AND your work data, synthesizes findings, and produces comprehensive reports with citations.
features.demo_angle: Ask: 'Research EV charging standards for 800V architectures — include market leaders and technical challenges'. Show the research report with sources.

features.title: Copilot Search (Preview)
features.description: AI-powered enterprise search that combines semantic understanding with your M365 data. Find content across SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive in one natural language query.
features.demo_angle: Ask: 'Find all documents related to our Q2 pipeline review'. Show results across all M365 sources.
